title: Beyond Orcrest
desc: Beyond Orcrest is a medieval dark fantasy role-playing region with a focus on shared world-building and community-driven narrative, with an expectation of mature conduct in the face of pretend adversity. They are strictly governed by a community code of conduct. The lore is expansive but kept shallow enough with enough space to write between the lines that most players will be able to find a niche they enjoy.

title: AirWaves Dance Club
desc: Step into a space where sound, light, and rhythm blend into a timeless experience. Driven by melodic energy and hypnotic beats, this destination invites you to lose yourself on the dancefloor and rediscover the magic of electronic music at its purest.

title: Golden&Grace Decor
desc: Golden&Grace Decor offers a premier collection of high-quality home furnishings, exclusively featuring the latest PBR materials for stunning realism. From elegant furniture to meticulous decor pieces, discover 100% original mesh designs crafted to bring luxury and light to your Second Life home. Experience the future of SL decor today!

title: Flow's Adult Hangout
desc: Flow’s Adult Hangout is a voice and text-friendly social lounge with an active 24/7 crowd. Visitors can play games, relax, and connect in an inclusive adult space that welcomes LGBTQ+ and all identities, with a focus on casual conversation and community.

title: Velvet Bohème
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Barefoot Beach
desc: Barefoot Beach offers calming waters far from the chaos of everyday life. Visitors can wander soft sands, surf through the day, or relax along the shore as their thoughts drift with the waves.

title: Velvet Bohème
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Hotel Eranthe
desc: Hotel Eranthe is a beautiful land that does not exist in any place or time. Escape from the real world and lose yourself in the beauty of this fantasy resort that is open to everyone. You can enjoy mini golf, games, the theater, the spa, the dancing fountains, archery, quiet spots to enjoy the scenery, a restaurant, and so much more. Just come and explore!

title: Feels Like Home - VIVE Ama Rie & Afterglow
desc: Feels Like Home is a coastal destination blending white marble, steampunk detail, and luxury living. Beaches, lounges, and shared spaces create a balance between retreat and connection. VIVE Ama Rie hosts live music, while Afterglow and rooftop sets bring performances across the shoreline.

title: Norway Racing Festival yrTsIZhi
desc: Norway Racing Festival is a multi-day virtual motorsport event hosted in Second Life, bringing together racing enthusiasts, drivers, performers, and creators from around the world. The festival features races, drift shows, live performances, contests, and community-driven activities, all designed to create an immersive and exciting motorsport experience. The event runs from March 16th through the grand finale on the 22nd. Learn more at nrfevent.com

title: Sandcastles
desc: Welcome to Sandcastles Adventure Park! Ride the rush of towering tsunami waves, sail out to open seas, then hit the track for high-speed racing across massive double-region courses designed for cars and bikes. Step into mystery at Merlin’s Cave and have your fortune told, or head over to the Gaming Lodge to try your luck with Greedy and classic casino games. Take to the skies or sea with a full range of free rentals—boats, submarines, balloon, sailboats, planes, helicopters, and windsurfing. Enjoy the park's diverse wildlife and dive deeper into nature at the underwater park. Looking for something more relaxing? Discover hidden romantic spots perfect for couples, or explore countless scenic locations across the region. Don’t miss the satellite destination in Bay City, where you can enjoy horseback riding and open-road driving adventures. Bring a friend—or someone special—and experience escape at Sandcastles.

title: Landkreis Hohenfels
desc: Willkommen in einer ruhigen und harmonischen Sim-Gemeinschaft in Second Life, in der entspanntes Wohnen im Mittelpunkt steht. Genieße die idyllische Atmosphäre, freundliche Nachbarschaft und ein stressfreies Miteinander – perfekt, um einfach abzuschalten und anzukommen. Gleichzeitig bietet die Sim vielfältige Roleplay-Möglichkeiten für alle die Roleplay möchten.

title: All Out Music
desc: All Out Music is a vibrant dance club where every event feels like a celebration. DJs spin feel-good hits from the 50s to today, including pop, rock, R&B, country, EDM, and more, keeping the dance floor alive from start to finish. With dynamic lighting, an upbeat crowd, and nonstop energy, it’s the perfect place to let loose, dance, and enjoy an unforgettable time.

title: wav
desc: .wav is a private estate and upscale community centered around high-quality Music featuring live mix DJs and quarterly live singer events. Professionally landscaped by Kaiden Tray and decorated for privacy. Enjoy the private beaches and bike rides throughout the island. There are Resident and group community areas with cuddle spots in an adult environment. Please respect the Residents and each other. Contact Klarity Rune or wavResidential for a rental application and waiting list details.

title: The Dancing Rabbit Cafe
desc: Welcome to The Dancing Rabbit Café, a whimsical little corner designed for slowing down. Settle in with your favorite drink, a journal, or your laptop, and let yourself linger a while among soft greenery and gentle spring touches. Whether you're catching up with friends, enjoying a quiet moment alone, or simply passing through, there's always a cozy nook waiting for you. And if you happen to spot the rabbits, feel free to feed them; they're part of the magic, too.

title: Excalibur Club
desc: Excalibur Club is an Italian dance destination focused on live DJs and singers, where visitors gather to enjoy music, dance, and spend time together in a lively atmosphere. The space encourages a friendly, respectful environment for shared moments and entertainment. Club per passare bei momnenti insieme con bella musica dove si balla e si sta in allegria.

title: Bid the Lindens Bald
desc: Bid the Lindens & Moles Bald returns for its 10th annual showdown in support of Relay For Life in Second Life. Teams of Lindens and Moles literally put their hair on the line. Residents vote with their donations: the teams that raise the most keep their locks, while the team that raises the least will go bald until the next birthday celebrations. Voting opens during RelayStock on April 10 and runs through April 15, culminating in the always-entertaining Haircut Party from 12:00–2:30 PM SLT, with the clippers coming out at 2:15 PM SLT. Learn more at relayrockers.org/bidthelindensbald

title: You were here before
desc: You don't remember coming here. But the forest remembers you. It has been waiting. The creatures in the forest are always watching. Always. Is it safe? Better stay on the path. Or don't. Be aware.

title: Etopia Earth Day Celebrations
desc: To help celebrate Earth Day for 2026, you're invited to explore, engage, and enjoy exhibits, activities, and discussions related to the theme "Our power, Our Planet". From wetlands exploration to bike trails, train rides to meditation spots, conversations and resources to cafes and gondola rides. Celebrations will kick off on 17 April and close with an Earth Day dance on 23 April at Etopia in Second Life.

title: Lakesong Meadow
desc: Welcome to Lakesong Meadow, where dreams blossom, and every experience is uniquely yours! Nestled in a breathtaking landscape of serene waters, lush gardens, and tranquil beauty, Lakesong Meadow is more than a destination; it is an experience designed to inspire, nurture, and enchant. From the moment you arrive, you are embraced by an atmosphere of elegance, warmth, and timeless charm. It also offers a romantic setting for weddings, ceremonies, and romantic getaways by the water.

title: Spring Spectaculum 2026
desc: Spring Spectaculum is a shopping and treasure hunting event with a Spring and Fantasy theme. The treasures are hidden in little wooden chests. Touch them for gifts, and definitely visit the Dinkie lane! The event runs from April 3rd to May 3rd. Come enjoy!

title: VWBPE 2026 Conference BzfnytvE
desc: The Virtual Worlds Best Practices in Education Conference runs March 19–21, 2026. This open conference is organized by educators to showcase learning, tools, and methods for virtual environments. Join the event for three days of lectures, workshops, discussions, games, and more - including a keynote speech by the Founder of Second Life, Philip Rosedale, and interviews with other Linden Lab executives. Learn more at vwbpe.org

title: Oulbury
desc: Oulbury is a curated coastal roleplay destination built around a “cozy horror” atmosphere, where slow-burn storytelling and supernatural elements shape everyday life. Set on a fog-covered North Atlantic island, the town blends quiet routines with subtle unease. Regular events, environmental systems like dynamic weather, and interconnected spaces create a living world where the atmosphere is as important as the story.

title: Nitroglobus Roof Gallery
desc: Nitroglobus Gallery is a Second Life art gallery that shows impressive exhibitions and installations of both emerging and well-known artists and is owned and curated by Dido Haas. The current exhibition is INFINITY WALL by Bamboo Barnes. The exhibit reveals her deepest feelings: uncertainty, vulnerability, and a quiet pain that has been lingering with her. The result is a powerful and intimate body of work that invites you to look closer.
